Video Multiplier:
Tube Mogul
About Tube Mogul:
System Description: TubeMogul.com is a video launch-pad that
submits your video to up to 21 different video host sites such as
YouTube, Google Video, MySpace Video, Revver and Viddler.
By allowing you to upload your video to all of these sites, Tube
Mogul not only saves time but also extends the reach of the
video to hit a greater percentage of the public. This increases
your odds of appealing to your target market. Backlinks in the
video description add to a site’s link authority and drive traffic
back to the video owner’s site.
Required Skills: Tube Mogul is relatively easy to use and doesn’t
require extensive knowledge or experience. That said, to maxi-
mize the traffic you receive through this tool, one should have
a good understanding of proper keyword tagging as it will help
with the video’s SEO.
System Checklist:
Step 1: Go to TubeMogul.com and sign up for a free acount,
Video 1
1. Confirm email address to complete your registration.
Step 2: Register with each video sharing site supported by
Tube Mogul (listed on the left in the resource section).
Weekly Action Plan:
All of the tasks listed here
can easily be completed in
less than a day. The more
videos you post, the better so
create a plan to post two to
five videos weekly.
Video Sharing Sites:
UncutVideo.aol.com
Blip.tv
Crackle.com
DailyMotion.com
http://video.google.com
Howcast.com
MetaCafe.com
MySpace.com
Revver.com
Sclipo.com
StupidVideos.com
Veoh.com
http://video.yahoo.com
Resources:

-- 1 of 2 --

Note: Tube Mogul allows you to submit videos to
any or all of the listed sites. Only sign up for those
sites where you wish to show your videos.
Step 3: Upload Your First Video to Tube Mogul by Click-
ing the “Upload a Video” Link Just Below the Dashboard
Tab, Video 1
1. Follow the instructions on the page to first select the
video from its location on your computer.
2. Enter a title, description, keyword tags and category
for your video.
Note: these will be submitted to each of the video
sharing sites along with your video
Step 4: Launch Your Video to Each Desired Site, Video 1
1. Enter account information for the corresponding site.
2. Check the box to include it in the launch.
3. Click the “Launch” button after all desired sites have
the correct account information and boxes checked.
Step 5: Wait Patiently for Tube Mogul to Upload Your
Video to the Various Sites Simultaneously
Step 6: Return to Tube Mogul to:
1. Check the status of your video launch.
2. Promote your Video to Social Bookmarking sites.
3. Click on the “Launch and Promote” link in the top
navigation.
4. Click on the “Promote” link next to the video you
wish to promote.
5. Click on each of the social bookmarking site icons
that you wish to use to promote your video.
System Checklist:	Quick Tips:
Use the description of your
video to create a back-link to
your website. A simple “find
out more at mywebsite.com”
is usually sufficient.
Get the keyword tagging
right. This means to tag the
video correctly with appro-
priate keywords. Violations
could get your video blocked
by both Tube Mogul and the
various video sites. Getting
it right will ultimately boost
your video’s visibility on each
of the sites as well as improve
the traffic driven back to your
website.
Use the charts and analyt-
ics to learn more about your
video and gain insights about
your audience.

-- 2 of 2 --
